excerpt: Manages Drivers across a market to ensure prompt receipt and delivery of equipment from/to customers and other Sunbelt locations in accordance with company and DOT standards.
Schedules third party haulers as needed at the direction of the Dispatcher.

Dispatch management in equipment rental covers the coordination of all physical movements of rental equipment: delivery to customers, collection at the end of rental, inter-depot transfers and collection of items for maintenance.
The strongest rental companies treat dispatch as a coordination point, not a handoff.

Our GPS fleet management software gives dispatchers real-time visibility through live GPS Maps, where you and your dispatchers can see real-time truck, equipment, and driver locations right on the scheduler map.
Dispatchers can drag and drop loads to the appropriate driver, automatically calculate route durations, and adjust schedules as needed.
